items.title: Man City's Haaland: Season 'not good enough'
items.summary: Erling Haaland has said his season has been "too up and down" after rediscovering his goalscoring form with a hat-trick against Liverpool.

items.title: Arbeloa: Blame for Real Madrid loss 'all mine'
items.summary: Coach Álvaro Arbeloa said responsibility for Real Madrid's dramatic 2-1 defeat at Mallorca was "absolutely, all mine."

items.title: Bayern Munich claim last-gasp win at Freiburg
items.summary: Bayern Munich's Tom Bischof scored a stoppage-time equaliser to rescue a 2-2 draw at Freiburg on Saturday.

items.title: Chelsea hammer Port Vale 7-0 in FA Cup QF
items.summary: Chelsea thrashed Port Vale 7-0 in the FA Cup quarterfinal on Saturday at Stamford Bridge.

items.title: Szoboszlai: No 'fighting spirit' in loss v. City
items.summary: Dominik Szoboszlai has said Liverpool lacked "fighting spirit" in their 4-0 defeat to Manchester City in the FA Cup and said it is "hard to find the words" to sum up his team's poor performance.

items.title: Groningen houdt play-offs binnen handbereik na zwaarbevochten zege bij Telstar
items.summary: FC Groningen heeft zaterdagavond gewonnen bij Telstar. Het eerste doelpunt in Groningse dienst van Ajax-huurling Dies Janse was genoeg voor de drie punten, al hadden de bezoekers meer moeten scoren.

items.title: VI Live: AZ op rozen, geen Timber bij Arsenal
items.summary: Na de interlandperiode staat de voetballiefhebber op zaterdag direct weer een aantal fraaie potjes in het clubvoetbal te wachten. Niet alleen wordt er in Nederland gespeeld, maar in de FA Cup staan Manchester City en Liverpool bijvoorbeeld tegenover elkaar en in La Liga speelt Barcelona tegen Atlético Madrid. Volg het voetbal in de VI Live.

items.title: Jans krijgt bevestiging: 'Als je drie keert scoort tegen PSV, doe je veel goed'
items.summary: Ron Jans kreeg tegen PSV opnieuw de bevestiging dat FC Utrecht zich kan meten met de topploegen in de Eredivisie, al leidde dat door de individuele klasse van Ismael Saibari en wat defensieve fouten bij zijn eigen ploeg niet tot een positief resultaat.

items.title: VI Live: García legt uit waarom Edvardsen in de basis start tegen Twente
items.summary: Ajax neemt het zaterdagavond om 21.00 uur op tegen FC Twente. Het verschil is momenteel één punt in het voordeel van de Amsterdammers. Lukt het de ploeg van John van den Brom om over Ajax heen te gaan? Je volgt het in deze VI Live.

items.title: Southampton v Arsenal: FA Cup quarter-final – live
items.summary: ⚽️ FA Cup updates from 8pm BST kick-off at St Mary’s ⚽️ Arteta admits to Carabao pain | Email Scott here Arsenal get to wear their first-choice red and white this evening. This is because Southampton will be dressed in yellow and blue, commemorating the 50th anniversary of their victory in the 1976 FA Cup final. Those are the colours they sported at Wembley as Bobby Stokes scored late on for Lawrie McMenemy’s second-division side, shocking hot favourites Manchester United. The commemorative shirt has the signatures of all the players in the cup-winning team woven into the fabric, and only 1,976 individually numbered replica shirts have been produced. Fans have been encouraged to follow suit with the retro colour scheme tonight, so let’s see if they comply. Southampton make five changes after the 2-0 Championship win over Oxford United. Nathan Wood, Cam Bragg, Caspar Jander, Léo Scienza and Ross Stewart come in for Cameron Archer, Shea Charles and Cyle Larin, who are benched, and Flynn Downes and captain Jack Stephens, who miss out altogether. Continue reading...

items.title: Jorrel Hato kills Port Vale’s FA Cup dream in 64 seconds as Chelsea hit seven
items.summary: It will take more than a thumping FA Cup quarter-final victory over the worst team in League One to ignite Chelsea’s season as it enters the defining stretch. This was, at least, a step in the right direction. Or, perhaps, it was just good for the club to avoid any further chaos. The occasion was framed by Liam Rosenior’s decision to ban his vice-captain, Enzo Fernández, for the game and Chelsea’s next one, which is here against Manchester City in the Premier League next Sunday. The manager felt he had to act after Fernández’s none-too-subtle message to Real Madrid during the international break. Basically, he is bang up for joining them. Continue reading...

items.title: PSV plaatst zich als derde club definitief voor Champions League
items.summary: PSV is dan nog niet officieel kampioen van Nederland, maar de titel kan de Eindhovenaren eigenlijk al niet meer ontgaan. De ploeg van Peter Bosz heeft wel al iets anders bewerkstelligd, namelijk het halen van de Champions League.

items.title: Ex-Chelsea player Oscar retires with heart issue
items.summary: Former Chelsea and Brazil midfielder Oscar retires after being diagnosed with a heart condition.

items.title: Liverpool's FA Cup capitulation ramps up pressure on Slot
items.summary: Nobody would have believed that 12 months on from Liverpool's title win, a fanbase so united behind its team and its manager would be, at best, apathetic as to whether Arne Slot remains in the job.

items.title: If Newcastle really want to be taken seriously, then Eddie Howe must join the exodus | Jonathan Wilson
items.summary: Most of what has gone wrong this season can be put down to poor recruitment – but the manager must share the blame Even when the fixture list was revealed last summer, it was perhaps predictable that the middle of March would represent the crisis point for Newcastle. If they had reached the Champions League quarter-finals and won the Tyne-Wear derby at St James’ Park, a lot of other frustrations could have been forgotten. Even better, that game against Sunderland would have had to be postponed had Newcastle reached a third Carabao Cup final since 2023. Those days of celebration a year ago feel a long time ago now, but the mood could easily have been very different. Newcastle were the better side in the home leg against Barcelona in the last 16 of the Champions League. Only the concession of a daft late penalty denied them victory and they were a persistent threat on the break in the first half of the away leg. Only in the second half of the second leg did the game get away from them: a 7-2 defeat made the difference between the sides seem much greater than it actually was. Continue reading...

items.title: Scottish Premiership: Miovski raises Rangers to summit after two-year wait
items.summary: Danny Rohl’s side move above Hearts on goal difference Hibernian and Falkirk cement top-six spots Danny Rohl told his Rangers players to stay “on the front foot” in the Premiership run-in after a 4-2 win over Dundee United took the Gers top for the first time in more than two years. Goals from Ryan Naderi, Dujon Sterling, Thelo Aasgaard and substitute Bojan Miovski proved too much in the end for the visitors, who scored through Amar Fatah and Zac Sapsford. Rangers were 13 points behind Hearts when Rohl took over as manager in October, but they lead the Jambos on goal difference with six games remaining, albeit their rivals have the chance to go back to the top when they travel to Livingston on Sunday. Third-placed Celtic, five points behind their Old Firm rivals, face Dundee at Dens Park later the same day. Continue reading...

items.title: Haaland's 'old-school' lesson for Liverpool as FA Cup record falls
items.summary: Manchester City have beaten Arsenal and taken apart Liverpool in their past two games and Erling Haaland's return to goalscoring form has laid down the gauntlet for the run-in.

items.title: Slot rues Liverpool’s ‘missing fighting spirit’ after humiliating FA Cup exit
items.summary: ‘Mentality wasn’t there’ in 4-0 loss to Manchester City Slot adds ‘the amount of goals we score is far too low’ Arne Slot slammed Liverpool’s “missing fighting spirit” after the 4-0 humiliation by Manchester City that propelled Pep Guardiola’s team into the FA Cup semi-finals. The manner of the 4-0 reverse will heighten scrutiny of the head coach’s future, with Liverpool next at Paris Saint-Germain for Wednesday’s Champions League quarter-final first leg. A similar defeat in the tie may prove terminal for Slot. Continue reading...

items.title: Haaland hat-trick sinks lacklustre Liverpool
items.summary: Manchester City's Erling Haaland scores a hat-trick in the 4-0 victory against Liverpool, which sends Pep Guardiola's side to the FA Cup semi-finals for an eighth successive season.

items.title: Ex-England defender Trippier to leave Newcastle
items.summary: Kieran Trippier is to leave Newcastle United when the defender's contract expires this summer.

items.title: C'est parti ! Suivez Union - Saint-Trond en Direct Commenté
items.summary: L'Union Saint-Gilliise accueille Louvain pour lancer ses Playoffs. Kamiel Van de Perre est finalement forait pour la rencontre.

items.title: Les dernières rumeurs, les officialisations : suivez le mercato en direct ! 04/04: Verbruggen - Kompany
items.summary: Toutes les rumeurs de transfert, toutes les officialisations regroupées en un seul article. On vous dit tout sur le mercato en Jupiler Pro League, en Challenger Pro League et sur celui des Diables Rouges... en direct !

items.title: Le Bayern se prépare à perdre un monument : Vincent Kompany miserait sur un ancien d'Anderlecht
items.summary: Le Bayern Munich envisage de se tourner vers le portier passé par le Sporting, en fonction de la décision de Manuel Neuer au terme de cette saison. Le coach Belge pourrait bien être réuni avec un joueur qu'il a côtoyé à Anderlecht.

items.title: FA Cup : Jérémy Doku et City humilient Liverpool, un Belge voit son conte de fées stoppé à Stamford Bridge
items.summary: Après-midi douloureuse pour Liverpool et la surprise Port Vale en quart de finale de la FA Cup, les deux formations n'ont pas survécu face à Manchester City et Chelsea et quittent la compétition.

items.title: Kompany wijst na onvoorstelbare comeback meteen naar miskleun van CL-tegenstander Real Madrid
items.summary: Vincent Kompany heeft er weer een bewogen voetbalnamiddag opzitten. Real Madrid opzij schuiven in de Champions League is de volgende uitdaging.

items.title: Afspraak met de geschiedenis: Standard wint voor het eerst in 1792(!) dagen in de play-offs
items.summary: OH Leuven en Standard zijn aan hun Europe Play-offs begonnen. De Leuvenaars wilden vertrouwen blijven tanken, de bezoekers wilden eindelijk nog eens winnen in de play-offs. Dat zou de Rouches ondanks een achterstand uiteindelijk gaan lukken.

items.title: LIVE: Opvallende afwezige bij Union voor clash met STVV
items.summary: Union SG neemt het thuis op tegen STVV om de Champions' Play-offs te openen. Vooral de afwezigheid van Kamiel Van De Perre valt op.

items.title: Guidé par un grand Adnane Abid, le Standard met fin à sa série de 30 matchs sans victoire en Play-Offs 2 !
items.summary: Emmené par la prestation cinq étoiles d'Adnane Abid, le Standard s'est imposé sur la pelouse de Louvain, ce samedi. La série de trente matchs sans victoire des Rouches en Play-Offs 2 est désormais terminée !

items.title: Steve Colpaert baalt na gelijkspel van Zulte Waregem: "Dat valt moeilijk uit te leggen"
items.summary: Zulte Waregem is de Relegation Play-offs begonnen met een 2-2-gelijkspel tegen Cercle Brugge. Vooral de zwakke eerste helft bleef Steve Colpaert achteraf dwarszitten, ondanks een sterke reactie na rust.

items.title: Stevige domper: KV Mechelen heeft slecht nieuws over zijn goudhaantje
items.summary: Als er bij KV Mechelen een speler als een goudhaantje bestempeld mag worden, is het wel de 17-jarige Moncef Zekri. De Belgisch-Marokkaanse linksachter heeft zijn laatste wedstrijd dit seizoen echter gespeeld.
